title: Verify existing implementation of auth middleware
description: The auth middleware already exists at src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts with full JWT validation (Bearer token extraction, 401 returns for missing/invalid/expired tokens, user context attachment). Tests exist at src/middleware/auth-middleware.test.ts covering all test strategy cases. All protected API routes use withAuth wrapper. No additional implementation needed.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts: createAuthMiddleware factory pattern with rate limiting
src/auth/withAuth.ts: HOC wrapper for route handlers with role-based access control
